homepage.title: Nine Rocks Games
homepage.description: Next-gen hunting game with vast open-world environments in the US and Europe, realistic firearms, hunting gear, and dozens of animals with realistic behavior.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Nine Rocks Games
April	22, 2026
Patch for the update 1.31 - Fitness bug fix
Read More
April	14, 2026
Patch for build 0.0.1
Way of the Hunter 2 receives a new patch (build version 0.0.1.188484) with fixes for frozen animal groups and other issues ahead of the first major update
April	8, 2026
Community feedback round #1
Community feedback round is live until April 14 - share your thoughts on Turkeys and Mule deer.
April	1, 2026
The Road to 1.0 for Way of the Hunter 2
From new maps to multiplayer and gear — here’s what’s coming to Way of the Hunter 2 during Early Access.
March	31, 2026
Patch for build 0.0.1
Patch 0.0.1 is now live with fixes and improvements, and we’re also kicking off our first community feedback round.
All News
